Medical Digital Twins

Live Webinar

Tuesday, 9 June 2026

Online


Attend this webinar to gain insight into:

Dynamic Patient Modeling and Digital Twins

Patient-specific models combining clinical, imaging, physiological, and wearable data for continuous monitoring and personalized care.

Virtual Organs and Disease Simulation

Digital models of organs and diseases for physiological simulation, intervention planning, and therapy optimization.

Predictive Therapy Simulation and Clinical Decision Support

AI-enabled approaches for treatment prediction, adaptive interventions, and data-driven clinical decision support.

Clinical Deployment of Medical Digital Twins

Validation and deployment of digital twin technologies across healthcare systems, remote monitoring, and clinical practice.

Schedule & Details

Date & Time Tuesday, 9 June 2026, 10:00–14:00 CEST (UTC+2)
Duration Approx. 4 hours
Platform Google Meet
Recording Available after the event

Webinar Access:
The webinar will take place via Google Meet and can be accessed directly in a browser on desktop, tablet, or smartphone without any additional installation. A microphone and webcam may be used, but are not required. Questions may also be asked via the chat.

We invite submissions for sessions focused on scientific exchange, technical innovation, and engineering best practices, including:

  • Academic talks and research presentations
  • Technical knowledge sharing and engineering insights
  • R&D showcases and innovation highlights
  • Workshops and tutorials
  • Live technology and remote system demonstrations
  • Live-streamed facility tours
